creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eric van Gyzen from comment #0)
That is interesting, because if booting EFI it should not even look at the partition active flag. It should just run boot1.efi from the ESP.

This hardware is on the blacklist because of issues, so I suppose it makes sense that it will have more issues.


What generation processor is in the T5810?
